name: Al Kruse Tennis Center
description: Al Kruse Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, locker rooms, water, trainers or lessons, food, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — $5 Open Play/$3 a person for Reservations

name: Aquarius Park
description: Aquarius Park is a place to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Aruba Bay Waterfront Resort
description: Aruba Bay Waterfront Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Private — This court is for registered guests staying at the property or owners.

name: Corpus Christi Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Corpus Christi Athletic Club in Corpus Christi, TX! There are 12 hard courts. 8 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Corpus Christi Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Corpus Christi Gym in Corpus Christi, TX! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Dink & Drink
description: Dink & Drink is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There are 8 concrete courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, lights, restrooms, and water. Reservations are available.

name: First Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Church in Corpus Christi, TX! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Flour Bluff High School
description: Flour Bluff High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There are 12 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Port Aransas Community Park
description: Port Aransas Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Port Aransas, TX. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Tennis Success
description: Come play pickleball at Tennis Success in Corpus Christi, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: YWCA Corpus Christi
description: YWCA Corpus Christi is a place to play pickleball in Corpus Christi, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.
